seed_finance.name: Finance Watchdog
seed_finance.description: Reviews overdue AR weekly, drafts polite nudge emails, flags anything > $5K.

inputs.prompt: For each overdue invoice found, classify as NORMAL (< $5K) or FLAG (>= $5K) and propose a 1-line nudge for each.

inputs.subject: Friendly reminder — open invoice
inputs.body: Use the reasoning output from the prior step.

inputs.message: Finance Watchdog: drafts ready for review.

seed_meeting_ready.name: Meeting Prep Pro
seed_meeting_ready.description: Pulls context for the next calendar event and prepares a 1-page brief.

inputs.prompt: Using the notes above, build a 3-section brief: 1) Background 2) Open questions 3) My recommended talking points.
